99        return asdict(self)
@dataclass
class GoalResult: 
102@dataclass
103class GoalResult:
104    """Result returned when waiting for a Goal to complete."""
105
106    goal_id: str
107    status: str
108    progress: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
109    artifacts: list[Artifact] = field(default_factory=list)
110    events: list[dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)

Result returned when waiting for a Goal to complete.

GoalResult( goal_id: str, status: str, progress: dict[str, typing.Any] = <factory>, artifacts: list[Artifact] = <factory>, events: list[dict[str, typing.Any]] = <factory>)
goal_id: str
status: str
progress: dict[str, typing.Any]
artifacts: list[Artifact]
events: list[dict[str, typing.Any]]
class BaseAgent(abc.ABC): 
 21class BaseAgent(ABC):
 22    """Abstract base for all Zelos Agents.
 23
 24    Subclass this and override:
 25      - declare_capabilities()
 26      - execute(task_payload)
 27
 28    The Runtime calls:
 29      - register()   — during agent registration
 30      - execute()    — for each dispatched Task
 31      - heartbeat()  — periodically (handled automatically)
 32      - shutdown()   — during Runtime shutdown
 33    """
 34
 35    def __init__(self, config: dict[str, Any] | None = None):
 36        self.config = config or {}
 37        self.agent_id: str | None = None
 38        self.runtime_endpoint: str | None = None
 39        self._running = False
 40        self._heartbeat_thread: threading.Thread | None = None
 41
 42    # ── Override these ──
 43
 44    @abstractmethod
 45    def declare_capabilities(self) -> list[CapabilityDeclaration]:
 46        """Return the capabilities this Agent provides.
 47
 48        Example:
 49            return [
 50                CapabilityDeclaration(
 51                    name="code-generation.python",
 52                    version="1.0.0",
 53                    description="Generates Python code",
 54                    tags=["python", "code-generation"],
 55                )
 56            ]
 57        """
 58        ...
 59
 60    @abstractmethod
 61    def execute(self, task: Task) -> dict[str, Any]:
 62        """Execute a Task and return the result.
 63
 64        Args:
 65            task: Task payload including description, input, memory_context.
 66
 67        Returns:
 68            dict with:
 69              - status: "completed" | "failed"
 70              - artifact: {content_type, content} (on success)
 71              - error: {code, message} (on failure)
 72        """
 73        ...
 74
 75    # ── Optional hooks ──
 76
 77    def validate_task(self, task: Task) -> bool:
 78        """Hook: reject Tasks this Agent should not handle.
 79
 80        Return False to reject — the Scheduler will reschedule to another Agent.
 81        """
 82        return True
 83
 84    def on_registered(self, agent_id: str):
 85        """Called after successful registration with the Runtime."""
 86        self.agent_id = agent_id
 87
 88    def on_shutdown(self):  # noqa: B027
 89        """Called before the Agent is shut down. Clean up resources here."""
 90        pass
 91
 92    # ── Lifecycle helpers (used by Runtime) ──
 93
 94    def start_heartbeat(self, interval_ms: int = 30000):
 95        """Start automatic heartbeat loop."""
 96        self._running = True
 97        self._heartbeat_thread = threading.Thread(
 98            target=self._heartbeat_loop,
 99            args=(interval_ms / 1000.0,),
100            daemon=True,
101        )
102        self._heartbeat_thread.start()
103
104    def stop_heartbeat(self):
105        """Stop the heartbeat loop."""
106        self._running = False
107        if self._heartbeat_thread:
108            self._heartbeat_thread.join(timeout=5)
109
110    def _heartbeat_loop(self, interval_s: float):
111        while self._running:
112            time.sleep(interval_s)
113            if self._running:
114                self.heartbeat()
115
116    def heartbeat(self) -> dict[str, str]:
117        """Send a heartbeat. Override to call the Runtime API."""
118        return {"status": "ok"}

Abstract base for all Zelos Agents.

Subclass this and override:
  • declare_capabilities()
  • execute(task_payload)
The Runtime calls:
  • register() — during agent registration
  • execute() — for each dispatched Task
  • heartbeat() — periodically (handled automatically)
  • shutdown() — during Runtime shutdown
config
agent_id: str | None
runtime_endpoint: str | None
@abstractmethod
def declare_capabilities(self) -> list[CapabilityDeclaration]: 
44    @abstractmethod
45    def declare_capabilities(self) -> list[CapabilityDeclaration]:
46        """Return the capabilities this Agent provides.
47
48        Example:
49            return [
50                CapabilityDeclaration(
51                    name="code-generation.python",
52                    version="1.0.0",
53                    description="Generates Python code",
54                    tags=["python", "code-generation"],
55                )
56            ]
57        """
58        ...

Return the capabilities this Agent provides.

Example:

return [ CapabilityDeclaration( name="code-generation.python", version="1.0.0", description="Generates Python code", tags=["python", "code-generation"], ) ]

@abstractmethod
def execute(self, task: Task) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
60    @abstractmethod
61    def execute(self, task: Task) -> dict[str, Any]:
62        """Execute a Task and return the result.
63
64        Args:
65            task: Task payload including description, input, memory_context.
66
67        Returns:
68            dict with:
69              - status: "completed" | "failed"
70              - artifact: {content_type, content} (on success)
71              - error: {code, message} (on failure)
72        """
73        ...

Execute a Task and return the result.

Arguments:
  • task: Task payload including description, input, memory_context.
Returns:

dict with:

  • status: "completed" | "failed"
  • artifact: {content_type, content} (on success)
  • error: {code, message} (on failure)
def validate_task(self, task: Task) -> bool: 
77    def validate_task(self, task: Task) -> bool:
78        """Hook: reject Tasks this Agent should not handle.
79
80        Return False to reject — the Scheduler will reschedule to another Agent.
81        """
82        return True

Hook: reject Tasks this Agent should not handle.

Return False to reject — the Scheduler will reschedule to another Agent.

def on_registered(self, agent_id: str): 
84    def on_registered(self, agent_id: str):
85        """Called after successful registration with the Runtime."""
86        self.agent_id = agent_id

Called after successful registration with the Runtime.

def on_shutdown(self): 
88    def on_shutdown(self):  # noqa: B027
89        """Called before the Agent is shut down. Clean up resources here."""
90        pass

Called before the Agent is shut down. Clean up resources here.

def start_heartbeat(self, interval_ms: int = 30000): 
 94    def start_heartbeat(self, interval_ms: int = 30000):
 95        """Start automatic heartbeat loop."""
 96        self._running = True
 97        self._heartbeat_thread = threading.Thread(
 98            target=self._heartbeat_loop,
 99            args=(interval_ms / 1000.0,),
100            daemon=True,
101        )
102        self._heartbeat_thread.start()

Start automatic heartbeat loop.

def stop_heartbeat(self): 
104    def stop_heartbeat(self):
105        """Stop the heartbeat loop."""
106        self._running = False
107        if self._heartbeat_thread:
108            self._heartbeat_thread.join(timeout=5)

Stop the heartbeat loop.

def heartbeat(self) -> dict[str, str]: 
116    def heartbeat(self) -> dict[str, str]:
117        """Send a heartbeat. Override to call the Runtime API."""
118        return {"status": "ok"}

Send a heartbeat. Override to call the Runtime API.

class DemoAgent(zelos_sdk.BaseAgent): 
121class DemoAgent(BaseAgent):
122    """Simple demo Agent — echoes the task description back as an artifact."""
123
124    def declare_capabilities(self) -> list[CapabilityDeclaration]:
125        return [
126            CapabilityDeclaration(
127                name="code-generation.python",
128                version="1.0.0",
129                description="Generates Python code from task descriptions",
130                tags=["python", "demo"],
131            )
132        ]
133
134    def execute(self, task: Task) -> dict[str, Any]:
135        return {
136            "status": "completed",
137            "artifact": {
138                "content_type": "application/json",
139                "content": {
140                    "code": f"# Generated for: {task.description}\ndef hello():\n    return 'Hello from Zelos!'",
141                    "language": "python",
142                },
143            },
144        }

Simple demo Agent — echoes the task description back as an artifact.

def declare_capabilities(self) -> list[CapabilityDeclaration]: 
124    def declare_capabilities(self) -> list[CapabilityDeclaration]:
125        return [
126            CapabilityDeclaration(
127                name="code-generation.python",
128                version="1.0.0",
129                description="Generates Python code from task descriptions",
130                tags=["python", "demo"],
131            )
132        ]

Return the capabilities this Agent provides.

Example:

return [ CapabilityDeclaration( name="code-generation.python", version="1.0.0", description="Generates Python code", tags=["python", "code-generation"], ) ]

def execute(self, task: Task) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
134    def execute(self, task: Task) -> dict[str, Any]:
135        return {
136            "status": "completed",
137            "artifact": {
138                "content_type": "application/json",
139                "content": {
140                    "code": f"# Generated for: {task.description}\ndef hello():\n    return 'Hello from Zelos!'",
141                    "language": "python",
142                },
143            },
144        }

Execute a Task and return the result.

Arguments:
  • task: Task payload including description, input, memory_context.
Returns:

dict with:

  • status: "completed" | "failed"
  • artifact: {content_type, content} (on success)
  • error: {code, message} (on failure)
class ZelosClient: 
 48class ZelosClient:
 49    """HTTP client for a remote Zelos Runtime.
 50
 51    Usage:
 52        client = ZelosClient("http://localhost:9876", api_key="zk-client-dev")
 53        client.health()                       # check Runtime health
 54        goal = client.submit_goal("Build...") # submit a Goal
 55        result = client.wait_for_goal(goal["goal_id"])  # wait for completion
 56    """
 57
 58    def __init__(
 59        self,
 60        base_url: str = "http://127.0.0.1:9876",
 61        api_key: str | None = None,
 62        timeout: float = 30.0,
 63        max_retries: int = 3,
 64    ):
 65        self.base_url = base_url.rstrip("/")
 66        self.api_key = api_key
 67        self.timeout = timeout
 68        self.max_retries = max_retries
 69
 70    # ── HTTP helpers ──
 71
 72    def _headers(self) -> dict[str, str]:
 73        headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
 74        if self.api_key:
 75            headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {self.api_key}"
 76        return headers
 77
 78    def _request(
 79        self,
 80        method: str,
 81        path: str,
 82        data: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 83    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 84        url = f"{self.base_url}{path}"
 85        body = json.dumps(data).encode() if data else None
 86        req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=body, headers=self._headers(), method=method)
 87
 88        last_error = None
 89        for attempt in range(self.max_retries):
 90            try:
 91                with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=self.timeout) as resp:
 92                    return json.loads(resp.read())
 93            except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
 94                error_body = {}
 95                try:
 96                    error_body = json.loads(e.read())
 97                except Exception:
 98                    pass
 99                if e.code == 401:
100                    raise AuthenticationError(
101                        f"Authentication failed: {error_body.get('error', 'Invalid API key')}"
102                    ) from e
103                if e.code == 404:
104                    return {"error": "not_found", "status_code": 404}
105                if e.code == 409:
106                    return {"error": "conflict", "status_code": 409, **error_body}
107                last_error = ZelosError(f"HTTP {e.code}: {error_body.get('error', str(e))}")
108            except urllib.error.URLError as e:
109                last_error = ConnectionError(f"Cannot reach Runtime at {url}: {e.reason}")
110            except Exception as e:
111                last_error = ZelosError(f"Request failed: {e}")
112
113            if attempt < self.max_retries - 1:
114                backoff = 2**attempt * 0.5
115                time.sleep(backoff)
116
117        raise last_error  # type: ignore[misc]
118
119    # ── Goal API ──
120
121    def submit_goal(
122        self,
123        description: str,
124        *,
125        priority: str = "medium",
126        budget: float = 0.0,
127        deadline_ms: int = 0,
128        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
129    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
130        """Submit a Goal to the Runtime. Returns {goal_id, status, ...}."""
131        payload: dict[str, Any] = {
132            "description": description,
133            "priority": priority,
134        }
135        if budget:
136            payload["budget"] = budget
137        if deadline_ms:
138            payload["deadline_ms"] = deadline_ms
139        if metadata:
140            payload["metadata"] = metadata
141        return self._request("POST", "/api/v1/goals", payload)
142
143    def get_goal_status(self, goal_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
144        """Get current status and progress of a Goal."""
145        return self._request("GET", f"/api/v1/goals/{goal_id}")
146
147    def list_goals(self, status_filter: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
148        """List all Goals, optionally filtered by status."""
149        path = "/api/v1/goals"
150        if status_filter:
151            path += f"?status={status_filter}"
152        return self._request("GET", path)
153
154    def cancel_goal(self, goal_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
155        """Cancel a running Goal."""
156        return self._request("DELETE", f"/api/v1/goals/{goal_id}")
157
158    def wait_for_goal(
159        self,
160        goal_id: str,
161        timeout_seconds: float = 600,
162        poll_interval: float = 1.0,
163    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
164        """Block until the Goal reaches a terminal state.
165
166        Returns the final Goal status dict.
167        """
168        terminal = {"completed", "failed", "cancelled", "rejected"}
169        deadline = time.time() + timeout_seconds
170
171        while time.time() < deadline:
172            status = self.get_goal_status(goal_id)
173            if "error" in status:
174                return status
175            if status.get("status") in terminal:
176                return status
177            time.sleep(poll_interval)
178
179        raise GoalError(
180            f"Goal {goal_id} did not complete within {timeout_seconds}s. "
181            f"Current status: {status.get('status', 'unknown')}"
182        )
183
184    # ── Agent API ──
185
186    def register_agent(
187        self,
188        name: str,
189        entrypoint: str,
190        capabilities: list[dict[str, Any]],
191        *,
192        protocol: str = "http",
193        endpoint: str = "",
194        max_concurrent_tasks: int = 5,
195        heartbeat_interval_ms: int = 30000,
196    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
197        """Register an Agent with the Runtime via HTTP."""
198        payload = {
199            "name": name,
200            "entrypoint": entrypoint,
201            "capabilities": capabilities,
202            "protocol": protocol,
203            "endpoint": endpoint,
204            "max_concurrent_tasks": max_concurrent_tasks,
205            "heartbeat_interval_ms": heartbeat_interval_ms,
206        }
207        return self._request("POST", "/api/v1/agents", payload)
208
209    def list_agents(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
210        """List all registered Agents."""
211        return self._request("GET", "/api/v1/agents")
212
213    def get_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
214        """Get details of a specific Agent."""
215        return self._request("GET", f"/api/v1/agents/{agent_id}")
216
217    def agent_heartbeat(self, agent_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
218        """Send a heartbeat for an Agent."""
219        return self._request("POST", f"/api/v1/agents/{agent_id}/heartbeat")
220
221    def submit_result(
222        self,
223        agent_id: str,
224        task_id: str,
225        result: dict[str, Any],
226    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
227        """Submit a Task execution result back to the Runtime."""
228        return self._request(
229            "POST",
230            f"/api/v1/agents/{agent_id}/tasks/{task_id}/result",
231            {"result": result},
232        )
233
234    # ── Admin API ──
235
236    def health(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
237        """Check Runtime health status."""
238        return self._request("GET", "/api/v1/health")
239
240    def metrics(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
241        """Get Runtime metrics (goals, tasks, agents)."""
242        return self._request("GET", "/api/v1/admin/metrics")
243
244    def list_capabilities(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
245        """List all registered capabilities."""
246        return self._request("GET", "/api/v1/capabilities")

HTTP client for a remote Zelos Runtime.

Usage:

client = ZelosClient("http://localhost:9876", api_key="zk-client-dev") client.health() # check Runtime health goal = client.submit_goal("Build...") # submit a Goal result = client.wait_for_goal(goal["goal_id"]) # wait for completion

ZelosClient( base_url: str = 'http://127.0.0.1:9876', api_key: str | None = None, timeout: float = 30.0, max_retries: int = 3) 
58    def __init__(
59        self,
60        base_url: str = "http://127.0.0.1:9876",
61        api_key: str | None = None,
62        timeout: float = 30.0,
63        max_retries: int = 3,
64    ):
65        self.base_url = base_url.rstrip("/")
66        self.api_key = api_key
67        self.timeout = timeout
68        self.max_retries = max_retries
base_url
api_key
timeout
max_retries
def submit_goal( self, description: str, *, priority: str = 'medium', budget: float = 0.0, deadline_ms: int = 0, metadata: dict[str, typing.Any] | None = None) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
121    def submit_goal(
122        self,
123        description: str,
124        *,
125        priority: str = "medium",
126        budget: float = 0.0,
127        deadline_ms: int = 0,
128        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
129    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
130        """Submit a Goal to the Runtime. Returns {goal_id, status, ...}."""
131        payload: dict[str, Any] = {
132            "description": description,
133            "priority": priority,
134        }
135        if budget:
136            payload["budget"] = budget
137        if deadline_ms:
138            payload["deadline_ms"] = deadline_ms
139        if metadata:
140            payload["metadata"] = metadata
141        return self._request("POST", "/api/v1/goals", payload)

Submit a Goal to the Runtime. Returns {goal_id, status, ...}.

def get_goal_status(self, goal_id: str) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
143    def get_goal_status(self, goal_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
144        """Get current status and progress of a Goal."""
145        return self._request("GET", f"/api/v1/goals/{goal_id}")

Get current status and progress of a Goal.

def list_goals(self, status_filter: str | None = None) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
147    def list_goals(self, status_filter: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
148        """List all Goals, optionally filtered by status."""
149        path = "/api/v1/goals"
150        if status_filter:
151            path += f"?status={status_filter}"
152        return self._request("GET", path)

List all Goals, optionally filtered by status.

def cancel_goal(self, goal_id: str) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
154    def cancel_goal(self, goal_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
155        """Cancel a running Goal."""
156        return self._request("DELETE", f"/api/v1/goals/{goal_id}")

Cancel a running Goal.

def wait_for_goal( self, goal_id: str, timeout_seconds: float = 600, poll_interval: float = 1.0) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
158    def wait_for_goal(
159        self,
160        goal_id: str,
161        timeout_seconds: float = 600,
162        poll_interval: float = 1.0,
163    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
164        """Block until the Goal reaches a terminal state.
165
166        Returns the final Goal status dict.
167        """
168        terminal = {"completed", "failed", "cancelled", "rejected"}
169        deadline = time.time() + timeout_seconds
170
171        while time.time() < deadline:
172            status = self.get_goal_status(goal_id)
173            if "error" in status:
174                return status
175            if status.get("status") in terminal:
176                return status
177            time.sleep(poll_interval)
178
179        raise GoalError(
180            f"Goal {goal_id} did not complete within {timeout_seconds}s. "
181            f"Current status: {status.get('status', 'unknown')}"
182        )

Block until the Goal reaches a terminal state.

Returns the final Goal status dict.

def register_agent( self, name: str, entrypoint: str, capabilities: list[dict[str, typing.Any]], *, protocol: str = 'http', endpoint: str = '', max_concurrent_tasks: int = 5, heartbeat_interval_ms: int = 30000) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
186    def register_agent(
187        self,
188        name: str,
189        entrypoint: str,
190        capabilities: list[dict[str, Any]],
191        *,
192        protocol: str = "http",
193        endpoint: str = "",
194        max_concurrent_tasks: int = 5,
195        heartbeat_interval_ms: int = 30000,
196    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
197        """Register an Agent with the Runtime via HTTP."""
198        payload = {
199            "name": name,
200            "entrypoint": entrypoint,
201            "capabilities": capabilities,
202            "protocol": protocol,
203            "endpoint": endpoint,
204            "max_concurrent_tasks": max_concurrent_tasks,
205            "heartbeat_interval_ms": heartbeat_interval_ms,
206        }
207        return self._request("POST", "/api/v1/agents", payload)

Register an Agent with the Runtime via HTTP.

def list_agents(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
209    def list_agents(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
210        """List all registered Agents."""
211        return self._request("GET", "/api/v1/agents")

List all registered Agents.

def get_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
213    def get_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
214        """Get details of a specific Agent."""
215        return self._request("GET", f"/api/v1/agents/{agent_id}")

Get details of a specific Agent.

def agent_heartbeat(self, agent_id: str) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
217    def agent_heartbeat(self, agent_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
218        """Send a heartbeat for an Agent."""
219        return self._request("POST", f"/api/v1/agents/{agent_id}/heartbeat")

Send a heartbeat for an Agent.

def submit_result( self, agent_id: str, task_id: str, result: dict[str, typing.Any]) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
221    def submit_result(
222        self,
223        agent_id: str,
224        task_id: str,
225        result: dict[str, Any],
226    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
227        """Submit a Task execution result back to the Runtime."""
228        return self._request(
229            "POST",
230            f"/api/v1/agents/{agent_id}/tasks/{task_id}/result",
231            {"result": result},
232        )

Submit a Task execution result back to the Runtime.

def health(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
236    def health(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
237        """Check Runtime health status."""
238        return self._request("GET", "/api/v1/health")

Check Runtime health status.

def metrics(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
240    def metrics(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
241        """Get Runtime metrics (goals, tasks, agents)."""
242        return self._request("GET", "/api/v1/admin/metrics")

Get Runtime metrics (goals, tasks, agents).

def list_capabilities(self) -> dict[str, typing.Any]: 
244    def list_capabilities(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
245        """List all registered capabilities."""
246        return self._request("GET", "/api/v1/capabilities")

List all registered capabilities.

class ZelosError(builtins.Exception): 
18class ZelosError(Exception):
19    """Base exception for Zelos SDK errors."""
20
21    pass

Base exception for Zelos SDK errors.

class ConnectionError(zelos_sdk.ZelosError): 
24class ConnectionError(ZelosError):
25    """Failed to connect to the Runtime."""
26
27    pass

Failed to connect to the Runtime.

class AuthenticationError(zelos_sdk.ZelosError): 
30class AuthenticationError(ZelosError):
31    """API key invalid or missing."""
32
33    pass

API key invalid or missing.

class GoalError(zelos_sdk.ZelosError): 
36class GoalError(ZelosError):
37    """Goal submission or execution failed."""
38
39    pass

Goal submission or execution failed.

class TaskTimeoutError(zelos_sdk.ZelosError): 
42class TaskTimeoutError(ZelosError):
43    """Task exceeded its timeout."""
44
45    pass

Task exceeded its timeout.
